name: Aisling Kerins, JayInslee.com
subject: Stop them FWD: Trump and the RGA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Never been more important. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=ODk4NTY3OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyNzE0NjY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Friend, Every day on this campaign, I'm reminded just how much we need to block state Republicans. They're bringing Trump-like politics to Washington, and we can't stand for it. But the Republican Governors Association could start attacking us at any moment to make sure we lose this November. And that's why I'm writing you today. **Stop Trump-like politics from coming to Washington: Donate to the campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=ODk4NTY3OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyNzE0NjY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thank you,
Aisling Kerins
JayInslee.com

name: Chris Koster
subject: In Remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
body:
Dear Friend,

As we celebrate Memorial Day, I join with you in honoring the brave men and women who paid the ultimate sacrifice in service of our country.

No matter when or where their sacrifice took place, their legacy extends to the soldiers, Marines, airmen, sailors and Coast Guardsmen still serving today. These servicemembers give us an example of what it means to be American and what it means to fight for democracy.

Thank you,

Chris

------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
------------------------------------------------------------------

Koster for Missouri
PO Box 1551
Jefferson City MO 65102 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-2120196416012417024/-7859768110821799936.

name: Karl Rove
subject: 23 Weeks.
body:
Peter,

There are only **23 weeks left** until Election Day 2016.

This election, Republicans have more at stake than ever.

**The White House, our GOP Senate majority, and the U.S. Supreme Court are all on the line.**

We have 24 Republican Senate seats up for reelection this year.

But with Democrats spending tens of millions of dollars to unseat our Republican senators in states like Illinois, Ohio, New Hampshire, Wisconsin and Pennsylvania, it's clear this election will be hard and difficult.

Our Republican majority is in jeopardy and with it, the Supreme Court. [**Are willing to fight for our Republican Senate? Then please pitch in $25 or more immediately >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35579370:W8jn_YYfN:m:1:1320601823:0AA8A1CD0EBBC077738BD10A15751B7F:r)

**A Republican victory will be impossible if our Senate campaigns are being OUTSPENT by Democrats and DROWNED by their negative ads.**
**
Will you take action?**
****
[ Pitch in $25, $50, $100 or any amount you can give and generous supporters of our Senate GOP Majority will triple-match every dollar you give.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35579371:W8jn_YYfN:m:1:1320601823:0AA8A1CD0EBBC077738BD10A15751B7F:r)
****
If committed conservatives do not act NOW, Republicans could face a series of tremendous losses this fall that devastate our conservative movement and damage our country 's future.

We need your help -- and fast. The FEC-mandated May reporting deadline is less than 48 hours away. Don't wait -- [please take action today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35579372:W8jn_YYfN:m:1:1320601823:0AA8A1CD0EBBC077738BD10A15751B7F:r)

Thank you,

Karl Rove
| [TRIPLE MATCH DONATE](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35579373:W8jn_YYfN:m:1:1320601823:0AA8A1CD0EBBC077738BD10A15751B7F:r)
---

name: John Gregg
subject: Remember those we've lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Of those brave souls who choose to serve, many will never return home, paying the ultimate price to keep their families, friends, and loved ones safe.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2193971651543435264/-1951045399711709184)
---
Peter, Each year, Hoosiers across the state enlist in the armed forces, and put their lives on the line for our freedoms. Of those brave souls who choose to serve, many will never return home, paying the ultimate price to keep their families, friends, and loved ones safe. Today, I'll be remembering those brave men and women, with deep gratitude in my heart -- and I hope you'll join me in doing the same. Happy Memorial Day, John Gregg

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2193971651543435264/-1878987805673781248) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2193971651543435264/-1806930211635853312)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---

Indianapolis IN 46244 United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: deepest thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend,
>
> On Memorial Day, we remember the brave men and women of our Armed Forces who have given their lives to defend the liberty and freedom we hold so dear.
>
> We owe a deep debt of gratitude to those who have made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our nation.
>
> We honor them by rededicating ourselves to ensuring that our veterans and those currently serving receive the full support of a grateful nation.
>
> Thank you and Happy Memorial Day,
>
> Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91de1/70cdc2ba/47eda96d/396d44f/1014455740/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em053016&source=em053016") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. name: Eric Greitens
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Memorial Day is, first and foremost, about honoring and remembering the fallen.
[](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabapM7hD3T7EFtrIfKuFrXCEJSHA3KoBFxHO91IU2jyjhZQkhYqfCQH-2Fg09hrFcoITh0RC4mE3w2yjmjV-2FIBX3a4joO6T-2Fy1CFL8iIjxCVTgOpysXpOuuwFGzZqM0rLbCvYA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23ziTeCJYWex1QxvOrva4SzMo0E9uvACiHQY4qYa8kwHvWslIpKz3Aq0-2BfAAeGolU87KUK9M-2BbkTkon921b177RtwExMXd8Q-2B9LKV2qM4R3P-2FjrmoMR2azzQ1Ocxme6p3-2FslI3YsjXoYfc6eHM89iyx2-2F0Lul7JPM1HGAcAHGLg2HvyTHzA56X7Y-2BSF-2FVeESIh9-2B-2FTWTgBSImxWkrL8tuJlFOTuw71nGKJJC96j0tahQ1dBI-2FGPD9h916XVyk6EmBmG1aeZ8VJpFGb4RQhCS2j0uApk6z1I4VcFX4KxJ-2BGyDBuE7Z-2Fj4wrTY6hSxfsafa7BCnx0DuiZe0icfXjmEs1vGOHuuvdtTo-2FA0HbvZy-2FM6eTBNpeyQ1bauWsqynTJgk3m8O0HjEQJfA1ryVDE-2F9q9v)
Now, that's an easy thing to write, "the fallen." And too often, words like that trip off of the tongue or land on the page, and we can forget the lives of those we've lost.

James Suh and Matt Axelson were two fine warriors. Two great patriots. Two good friends. They were both in BUD/S Class 237, and on June 28, 2005, when Matt Axelson was pinned down in a firefight with the Taliban, James Suh ran to and boarded a helicopter. He flew in to rescue Axe. The helicopter was shot down, and both Axe and Suh died that day.

I imagine that if you'd been able to stop James Suh, just as he was getting on that helicopter, and you'd been able to say to him, "Suh, why are getting on this helicopter?," he wouldn't have said, "To win the Global War on Terrorism," or "To defeat the Taliban." If he would have said anything at all, I bet that he would have just said, "because my friend Matt Axelson needs me."

It's that spirit of devotion, that quiet and complete courage, that we should remember on a day like today.

On Memorial Day, we often put our hands on our hearts and say the Pledge of Allegiance. As we do so, and feel the beat of our own heart, let us reflect that some--our country's true and perfect heroes--gave their very lives, so that we could live ours in freedom.

All of these men and women, they are our brothers and sisters, our fathers and mothers--if not in blood, then in spirit--because it is their sacrifice, that has made our lives possible.

Now, when some reflect on the enormity of the sacrifice that others have made, they can--in their solemn devotion--feel that somehow a Memorial Day of burgers and brats and baseball is inadequate. Well, far be it for me to tell anyone how to celebrate; but I like to imagine that if James Suh and Matt Axelson could speak to us, that they'd want us to remember them and all of the fallen--and I also imagine that they'd want us to enjoy the very things that they sacrificed for: freedom, faith, family, and the right to have some fun. Have a beautiful Memorial Day, everyone!

Best,

Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. [Unsubscribe](http://links.ericgreitens.com/asm/unsubscribe/?user_id=2167711&data=eYe3Mv1rdzQBkyeIe4KU5gmjDdHaPgWH4apophIa2JFhCEQI6wYzN7hu77-Y0E44DpmomYCz1ssDCtfTzHPPfsskzt6UBhvCPYiZ0pEQ18ZI-YuvYNbCBEkPlKXDfKp6VFJfsP9SOBTQ0QfG96HwevoYDtFBQVPF8HnNR4uKKbNd5qK2bcyXChImIqtoe3k1HN-Qt84H1UVXH8QbWi3m2Qj4YCMXACmc0vqApVceQNoPceDeGYVSrNASGWtMIsddMr6xRrqjv80Nfm_WzyqSTH0uKRl9_QeC0WpIG9ThIDTyNncud6CL2mQofpS7kB0MNkNZUC_cg9at9J7ExW2EmDvrtwmOoQaT2Kc2QEJ_S3TuDczFr7iK7QkW2aPoUuXY6VIlXxxSr7G2CUCnukjsXhnNMBn4uNVqEj8auEyTK0NacwxZ3y0lov0IjX7VUtJJaaziK7GPdcymRafRKH_nEPCBeC4YPd-wwcsZ3w7TaXhbit9BQXxFrZNSnmqVs7Ms8TqLjhUiXiYtXSNdhJjkZKu2yFAcQhPd8zwIeOYgNd-qY0toFrA47AW1mFzE2bEbRAsdj2aGQnhDoS8gacvuKxNV7Cw9fY-WyeWUFaX1J8K1_0_guBNh15MOdRrmEpEC)
